crossRefs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

blocks.text: 1. Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box 2. Check inputs and replace fuse box if all is normal and system is faulty inspection terminal Wiring color Measuring conditions result Inspection items in case of abnormality P1 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. B8 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. U17 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. T27 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. J13 tea Shift lever to P position Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground. J9 hollow Turn ignition to ON mode Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground. J8 new leaves Turn ignition to ON mode Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground. J15 * green Activate front wiper motor 0V to approx. 12V cycling between the inspection terminal and body ground during motor rotation. H19 * green Activate rear wiper motor 0V to approx. 12V cycling between the inspection terminal and body ground during motor rotation. C8 red Brake pedal Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground. H20 hollow Turn ignition to ON mode Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground. R22 black Turn wiper switch to INT or LO position There should be continuity between the inspection terminals. R26 purple R22 black Turn wiper switch to LO or HI position There should be continuity between the inspection terminals. R20 weak matcha R22 black Wiper switch to MIST position There should be continuity between the inspection terminals. R24 new leaves R22 black Turn washer switch ON There should be continuity between the inspection terminals. R25 green A10 new leaves Turn ignition to ON mode and short between A10 and B5 terminals Washer motor must operate. B5 hollow *: Reconnect the coupler

refs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box
Check inputs and replace fuse box if all is normal and system is faulty

items.text: Before inspection, check for blown relay box No. A20 (10A), No. A21 (20A) and fuse box No. C13 (7.5A), No. C5 (7.5A) fuses and their connections.
If there is no DTC display and there is a problem with the rear wiper operation, first Inspect rear wiper motor. and inspect the grounding circuit.
Each coupler is all female-terminated on the cord side.
